title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS backed by $85M+ and trusted by brands like The New York Times and Wiz, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer comfortable working with the Tel Aviv HQ and globally distributed teams.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds the 7+ year requirement, deep B2B SaaS and fintech expertise aligns perfectly with Finout's domain, proven track record scaling revenue operations in high-growth environments, and senior leadership experience directly matches the Head of RevOps scope reporting to CRO.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and immediately thought of you given your 15+ years scaling GTM operations in B2B SaaS and fintech—exactly what the CRO needs as Finout continues hypergrowth across global markets. Your expertise in Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional revenue leadership at scale directly mirrors their growth stage and challenges. Would love to explore whether this aligns with your next chapter.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Platomics, a healthcare-focused company, is hiring a Revenue Operations Manager to be the backbone of its revenue engine. You'll design, optimize, and document workflows across sales, marketing, and customer success, build dashboards, analyze funnel metrics, and administer the CRM (HubSpot). Responsibilities include forecasting, territory planning, and quota setting. Certifications in Salesforce, HubSpot, or RevOps are valued. Offers competitive salary, remote flexibility across Europe, and the chance to improve healthcare for millions.
score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps Manager target role, HubSpot expertise, and core GTM/pipeline forecasting competencies. Healthcare is adjacent to Omri's B2B SaaS strength, and remote Europe option works well geographically.
ai_opener: Omri here—15+ years building revenue engines in B2B SaaS, with deep HubSpot and Salesforce admin experience. Platomics' focus on optimizing sales/marketing/CS workflows and forecasting accuracy is exactly where I've driven the most impact. I'd love to discuss how to scale your revenue foundation while keeping healthcare's unique complexity in focus.

title: RevOps Expert
description: Remote, the global employment platform, seeks a RevOps Expert to optimize sales processes and system architecture. You'll drive strategic initiatives aligned with GTM strategy, champion scalable process design, and implement solutions using Six Sigma and Agile. Requires deep Salesforce expertise, enterprise SaaS tools, experience with LeanData, Zapier, or Camunda, strong process design skills, and a data-driven mindset. B2B SaaS and global startup experience preferred. Fully remote with no relocation required.
score_reason: Exceptional match for a senior RevOps leader—the role directly aligns with Omri's core expertise in Salesforce, GTM strategy, process optimization, and B2B SaaS scaling. The fully remote structure and focus on enterprise systems architecture make this an ideal fit for his experience level and career trajectory.
ai_opener: I came across Remote's RevOps Expert role and immediately recognized the strategic opportunity. With 15+ years scaling revenue operations in B2B SaaS—including deep Salesforce architecture, GTM process design, and managing complex global sales systems—I've built the exact skill set you're seeking to optimize your sales infrastructure and drive predictable growth at scale.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a leader in revenue intelligence, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations. You'll accelerate revenue growth through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design, partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory composition. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management, comfort with ambiguity in a fast-paced environment, and a builder's mindset. Salary range $149,000-$175,000 USD, with comprehensive benefits and remote work support.
score_reason: Excellent match for Omri's RevOps expertise and GTM strategy background. Gong.io's revenue intelligence focus aligns perfectly with his pipeline forecasting and data-driven optimization strengths, while territory strategy and cross-functional leadership are core competencies.

Your Territory Strategy & Operations role caught my attention because designing efficient territory composition and forecasting impact is exactly where I've driven the most growth at my previous companies. I'd love to explore how my experience with complex sales infrastructure could help Gong accelerate its revenue operations.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: Flex seeks a Revenue Operations Manager - Systems to build the operational foundation of its New Verticals division. You'll own the Salesforce environment, design tech-stack integrations (CRM, enrichment, routing, marketing), establish system architecture and governance, and architect the lead-to-close sales process. Requires 5+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops/GTM Ops with 2+ in a senior capacity, deep Salesforce configuration expertise, and a builder mentality. Familiarity with Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot; AI tooling experience a plus.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, deep Salesforce expertise, and proven track record building operational foundations align perfectly with this systems-focused role. The remote option suits his location preferences, though US-only constraint is slightly limiting.

With 15+ years building Salesforce environments and GTM tech stacks for scaling B2B SaaS, I've led exactly this kind of foundational build—designing CRM architecture, integrations (enrichment, routing, marketing automation), and lead-to-close processes that support rapid growth. I'd be excited to discuss how I can accelerate your systems foundation.

title: GTM Engineer
description: FacilityOS, a B2B SaaS facility-management platform serving mid-to-large enterprises, is building its first AI Workforce—intelligent agents that help Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success work smarter. As GTM Engineer, you'll build, configure, and continuously improve these AI agents, working at the intersection of data, automation, and human workflows. You'll design how their AI systems connect, run, learn, and improve over time, weaving AI into the company's go-to-market motion across support, success, sales, and marketing.
score_reason: Strong alignment with GTM Engineer role, AI-native GTM expertise, and B2B SaaS background. FacilityOS's focus on AI agents for Sales/CS/Marketing workflows directly matches Omri's RevOps automation and GTM optimization strengths, though facility management is outside core fintech/AI verticals.

Having architected revenue stacks and automation systems for high-growth B2B SaaS companies, I'm energized by the challenge of designing how AI systems learn and improve within go-to-market motions rather than just executing them.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Pylon seeks a GTM Engineer to test, implement, and optimize an AI outbound solution from setup through performance tuning. You'll build automated outbound sequences with high deliverability, own email infrastructure (domain health, warming, deliverability), create data pipelines between marketing tools, CRM, and sales tooling, and collaborate with RevOps on lead scoring and routing. Requires 3+ years in marketing operations or GTM/growth engineering at B2B SaaS companies, hands-on marketing automation experience, and strong technical skills with APIs and webhooks.
score_reason: Excellent match for GTM Engineer role leveraging Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS expertise, RevOps background, and pipeline/forecasting strengths. AI-native outbound optimization aligns perfectly with modern GTM engineering, though role is slightly more technical/IC-focused than typical Head of RevOps targets.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed your RevOps background spans B2B SaaS scaling—Pylon's looking for someone to own AI outbound infrastructure from ground zero, building automated sequences, email deliverability, and data pipelines between marketing and sales tools. Given your experience optimizing pipeline and forecasting, this GTM Engineer role could be a natural lateral that puts you closer to the technical implementation side of revenue systems.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research, used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. Scaling rapidly, they need a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations that make the GTM team highly effective. You'll replace manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines, activation flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly.

ai_opener: Conveo's vision of AI-powered GTM workflows—lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines, activation flows—directly mirrors the kind of RevOps infrastructure I've built at scale. With 15+ years automating B2B SaaS GTM stacks and deep Salesforce/HubSpot expertise, I'm curious how you're thinking about the operational backbone that makes those AI agents actually stick in a GTM motion.
